name: coassisted-workspace-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the CoAssisted Workspace plugin — a Google Workspace + AP/AR + PandaDoc automation stack for Claude Cowork.

plugins.name: coassisted-workspace
plugins.description: Google Workspace + AP/AR automation for Claude Cowork. 390 tools across Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Tasks, Contacts, Chat, Maps, Route Optimization, AP/AR receipt + invoice + collections, project labor ingestion, master rollups, and PandaDoc quote workflows.
